sentence: 管理员帮我重置了账号密码。
pinyin: Guǎnlǐyuán bāng wǒ chóngzhì le zhànghào mìmǎ.
english: The administrator helped me reset my account password.

sentence: 医生说她的子宫一切正常。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō tā de zǐgōng yīqiē zhèngcháng.
english: The doctor said her uterus is completely normal.

meaning: 1. work chant; 2. prison cell; 3. type; 4. sort; 5. mark; 6. sign; 7.
sentence: 工人们喊着号子一起搬重物。
pinyin: Gōngrénmen hǎn zhe háozi yīqǐ bān zhòngwù.
english: The workers chanted a work song together while carrying the heavy load.

sentence: 他这次考试得了低分，很沮丧。
pinyin: Tā zhè cì kǎoshì dé le dīfēn, hěn jǔsàng.
english: He got a low score on the exam this time and was very discouraged.

sentence: 这款笔记本用的处理器速度很快。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn bǐjìběn yòng de chǔlǐqì sùdù hěn kuài.
english: The processor in this laptop is very fast.
